      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiꞥſch us nahksi/ us to Semmi/ ko es teeen: Leezeet pee juhsu Sirdim fraeta Behrneem dohſchu.
wifus tchohs Wahrdus/ ko es
Schodeen juhsu Starpâ avleezi-
najin/ ko jums faaweem Behrneem
buhs pawehleht / ka tee turu un
darra wiﬁus ﬂchihs Bauﬂibas
Wahrdus."
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas ne irr kahds wel-
tigs Wahrdz preekſch juins/ bet
tas irr juhsu Dsihwiba/ un zaur
fcho Wahrdz taps juhsu Dsihwi-
ba pagarrzinata wirs tahs Sem-
mes/ us kurren juhs pahr to Jar-
danu eijat winnu eemantoht."
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to runnaja tas
KUNGS us Mohsu tai paſcha
Deenâ/ un fazzija:"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kahp us to Kalnu Aba-
rim/ſchis irr tas Kalns Neebus/
kas irr eekſch Moaba Semmes/
kas prett Jeriku irr / un ſkattees
to Kanaana Semmi/ ko es Isra-
ëta Behrneem par Jhpaſchumu
dohſchu."
    },
    {
      "n": 50,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un mirsti us to Kalnu /
: kad tu tur uskahpfi / un tohpi
tawcem Zandim peepulzinahts /
ittin ka Aarons taws Brahlis
nomirre us to Kalnu Or/ un tap-
pe faaweemZandim peepulzinahts."
    },
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht / ka juhs prett
mannim effat noseegufchees starp
Israëta Behrneem pee to Bahr-
schanas-Uhdeni Kahdesâ / eekſch
tahs Tuſfnetes Bin / tapehz ka
juhs mann ne effat fivehtijschi
Israëta Behrnu Widdû."
    },
    {
      "n": 52,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tu redſefi to Semmi
tew pretti/ bet us turren tu ne"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXXIII. Vodalla.
Mohsus ſwehti tohs diwipadeſmits Ifraë
Ziltis preekſch jawas Mirſchanas: 1/ 2. 1
ſtabſia kas furram nashkoſchu Laika us ees:
Chis nu irr tas Swe
tums/ ar ko Mohsus ta
Deewa Wihrs Ifraë
Behrnus preekſch jawas Mi
ſchanas ſwehtijs irr.
Un wiꞥſch fazzija: Ta
KUNGS irr no Sinai nahzis
un irr wiꞥſchem usgahjis no Se-
ra/ wiꞥſch irr atſpihdejs no Pa-
rana Kalna / un irr nahzis a-
dauds tubkſtoſcheem Swehteem
pa winna labbo Rohku bija wee-
na ugguniga Bauſliba us teem
Ka mihto wiꞥſch tohs Cain-
dis/ wiﬁi winna Swehti irr ta-
wá Rohka/ tee taps pee tawahu
Kahjahm fehdinati / tee reimfee-
no tarveem Wahrdceem.
Mohsus irr mums to Bau-
ſlibu pawehlejs/ Jehkaba Drau-
dses Jhpaſchumam.
Wiꞥſch bija Rehninſch pak-
Jefchurun/ kad to Lauschu Wir-
neeki fapulzejahs ar Ifraë-
Ziltim.
Ruhbens lai dsihwo un u-
mirst/ un winna Puls irr mas.
Un tas irr / ko wiꞥſch n-
Juhta fazzija: Klaust KUNGS
Juhta Balkni / un peewed-
winnu pee faaweem Zandim/ laid-
winnu Rohka winnam ſtipra-
irr/ un effi tu winna Palihdſ-
ba prett winna Eenaidneefeem."
